creator: tacid@tacid.kiev.ua
text:
2010/2/20 Ion-Mihai Tetcu <itetcu@freebsd.org>:
> On Sat, 20 Feb 2010 00:20:04 GMT
> "Paul Shepel" <tacid@tacid.kiev.ua> wrote:
>
>> =A02) with linux_base-f8 it works good, but I did not test sound, chat
>> is fine ;)
>
> The point is that sound won't work -- that's why the port ain't updated
> to this version. (There's also a strange problem on amd64, but I hacked
> around it).
>
> I've been working with miwi@ and a few other people to get it working,
> during the last months, without advancing very far.
>
> We're pursuing an other avenue with Skype, but I can't talk about it
> for now (both miwi@ and I are under NDA with Skype as beta-testers and
> we'll probably have to sign an other one).

Ok than. I understood. I think than it's a right time to close this PR :)
I didn't tests sound, my bad ...

Thank you. Good luck in your work!

--=20
Best Regards,
Paul
